changes.value: : is bound to app.command in vim keybindings but createKeyHandler skips single-char keys when focus is in editable context. Need to verify this works when no editor is focused.\n\nKey files: keybindings.ts (createKeyHandler, vim bindings)
Bug: Vim : keybinding doesn't trigger command palette

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-: is bound to app.command in vim keybindings but createKeyHandler skips single-char keys when focus is in editable context. Need to verify this works when no editor is focused.\n\nKey files: keybindings.ts (createKeyHandler, vim bindings)
\ No newline at end of file
+: is bound to app.command in vim keybindings. createKeyHandler skips single-char keys when focus is in editable context (INPUT, TEXTAREA, .cm-editor, contenteditable). Should work when board itself has focus.\n\nLogging added to keybindings.ts — console.debug shows: mode, normalized key, target element, skip reason, match result. Check browser console with `:` key to see if it's being skipped and why.\n\nKey files: keybindings.ts (createKeyHandler lines 157-217)
\ No newline at end of file
